mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room (room_id, player1_id, player2_id, status, winner) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{player1Id}, #{player2Id}, #{status}, #{winner})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM room ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE room SET end_time = #{endTime}, duration = #{duration} WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as totalBattles, COUNT(CASE WHEN DATE(create_time) = CURDATE() THEN 1 END) as todayBattles, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 END) as activeBattles FROM room
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room WHERE DATE(create_time) = #{date}

SELECT DATE(create_time) as date, COUNT(*) as roomCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM viewer WHERE DATE(viewer.join_time) = DATE(room.create_time)) as viewerCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room r2 WHERE DATE(r2.end_time) = DATE(room.create_time) AND r2.status = 2) as gameCount FROM room WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY DATE(create_time)
SELECT * FROM room WHERE status = 0 AND create_time <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{timeoutMinutes} MINUTE)
mapper.update:
UPDATE room SET status = 2, end_time = NOW(), duration = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, create_time, NOW()) WHERE room_id IN
#{roomId}
UPDATE room SET status = #{status}, winner = #{winner}, end_time = #{endTime}, duration = TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, create_time, #{endTime}) WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM room WHERE (status = 2 AND (player1_id IS NULL OR player2_id IS NULL)) OR (status = 1 AND create_time <= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)) ORDER BY create_time ASC
